note: The evaluator consumes the upstream released Qwen2.5-Coder-32B function-localization outputs. The files are referenced by immutable commit and SHA-256 rather than redistributed.

normalization.function_and_assignment: exact base-commit path, kind, and qualified symbol
normalization.class: exact eligible entity or direct canonical member expansion
normalization.deduplication: normalized path, entity kind, and qualified symbol
